series_metadata.series_description: Grant agreements, invoices & expenditure reports, support documentation, RFPs, award letters, reports, draw requests, sole source letters, associated documentation and emails.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Three years from date of submission of final expenditure report or, Federal awards that are renewed quarterly or annually, from date of submission of quarterly or annual financial report, respectively, as reported Federal awarding agency or pass-through entity in case of a subrecipient
